You look tired today.
Yeah, I stayed up late working on a project.
Want some coffee?
Definitely. I need it right now.
Same here. Let's grab a cappuccino.
How's the new project going?
It's progressing well, but we need more time for testing.
Any major issues?
Just a few bugs. The team is fixing them.
Great. Keep me updated.
Do you think this jacket looks good on me?
Yes, it suits you really well.
Should I buy it?
If you like it and it's within your budget, go for it.
How was your day?
It was good. Work was a bit busy though.
Did you have lunch on time?
Yes, I did.
Good. Dinner is ready.
Excuse me, how do I get to the railway station?
Go straight and take the second left.
Is it far from here?
No, it's about a ten-minute walk.
Thank you!
What seems to be the problem?
I've had a fever for two days.
Any cough or headache?
Yes, both.
I'll prescribe some medicine and recommend rest.
How often do you work out?
About three times a week.
What's your goal?
I want to lose some weight and build strength.
Great, let's create a plan for you.
Did you watch the new movie?
Yes, I watched it yesterday.
How was it?
The story was great, but the ending surprised me.
Now I'm excited to watch it.
Which gate is Flight 302 departing from?
Gate 12. Boarding starts in 20 minutes.
Thank you.
You're welcome. Have a pleasant journey.
Tell me about yourself.
I'm a software developer with five years of experience in mobile applications.
Why do you want to join our company?
I like the projects you're working on and want to contribute my skills.
Where should we go this weekend?
How about Coorg?
Sounds good. How are we travelling?
We can drive there.
Perfect. Let's book a hotel.
Where can I find the rice?
It's in aisle five.
Thanks. Do you have any discounts today?
Yes, there's a 10% discount on groceries above ₹2000.
Have you tried the new AI tool?
Yes, it's pretty impressive.
What do you use it for?
Mostly coding assistance and content generation.
What's the mileage of this car?
Around 19 km/l.
Does it have cruise control?
Yes, this variant includes cruise control.
I'd like to take a test drive.
